# UC-17.6.3 · Akamai Guardicore Deception Asset Interaction Alerts (`guardicore:deception`)

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Security, Risk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We use network security tools to watch who accesses what, help prevent data leaks, enforce network isolation, and secure cloud and remote access.*

---

## Description

Any touch of a decoy is high-fidelity malicious activity with near-zero benign noise.

## Value

SOC elevates to full incident on first connection.

## Implementation

Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

## SPL

```spl
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:deception" earliest=-7d
| stats count by decoy_name, src_ip, attack_stage
| sort -count
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic
  by All_Traffic.user, All_Traffic.action, All_Traffic.src, All_Traffic.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Notable events list, map.

## Known False Positives

Microseg blocks from new app deployments, missing exception rules, or planned segmentation rollouts.

- [Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/7426)
